records.evidence_text: PVD_03 handed over from PM shift. Tool in IDLE.
Previous shift noted intermittent arc events on TiN target
PM shift cleared arcs, no further action taken.
2210h - Loaded lot LOT_0080 (25 wfrs). Recipe: PVD_TiN_BARRIER_V3.

data.curr_state: base pressure within spec; deposition started

records.evidence_text: W001 base pressure reached 3.8e-6 Pa. Within spec. Deposition started.
2237h - W002 loaded. Pump-down OK ... Dep started.
2249h - W003 loaded. Pump-down to 4.0e-6 Pa. Dep started.
Arc event detected on TiN target during W003 dep. System auto-suppressed.
DC power dipped from 3000 W to 2750 W for ~2s then recovered.
2303h - Third arc event. Arc count: 3. Arc frequency threshold (3 arcs in 30 min) reached.
Lot LOT_0080 put on hold at W004.
Notified on-call engineer (Eng. Priya R.) at 2304h.
2330h - Target replacement started. Old target removed (serial: TGT_TiN_0044, age: 87%, arc count: 412 lifetime).
0010h - New target installed (serial: TGT_TiN_0051, age: 0%). Break-in procedure started
0117h - W004 dep started with new target.
Subsequent wafers W005 through W025 processed without incident.
No arc events on new target.
W001 to W003: PASS (old target, pre-replacement)
W003: borderline thickness flagged for review (485 A)
LOT_0080 unloaded and staged for next step.

data.step: unloaded and staged for next step

records.evidence_text: PVD_03 handed over from PM shift. Tool in IDLE.
Previous shift noted intermittent arc events on TiN target
PM shift cleared arcs, no further action taken.
2210h - Loaded lot LOT_0080 (25 wfrs). Recipe: PVD_TiN_BARRIER_V3.

data.state: base pressure within spec; deposition started

records.evidence_text: Dep params: Ar flow = 30 sccm, N2 flow = 10 sccm, DC power = 3000 W, temp = 250 degC
W001 base pressure reached 3.8e-6 Pa. Within spec. Deposition started.
2237h - W002 loaded. Pump-down OK ... Dep started.
2249h - W003 loaded. Pump-down to 4.0e-6 Pa. Dep started.
Arc event detected on TiN target during W003 dep. System auto-suppressed.
DC power dipped from 3000 W to 2750 W for ~2s then recovered.
Marginally low but within tolerance. PASS.
Second arc event during pump-down phase. Arc count: 2.
2303h - Third arc event. Arc count: 3. Arc frequency threshold (3 arcs in 30 min) reached.
Lot LOT_0080 put on hold at W004.
Notified on-call engineer (Eng. Priya R.) at 2304h.
Target surface shows micro-nodule formation consistent with late-life arcing.

data.fault_description: micro-nodule formation consistent with late-life arcing

records.evidence_text: 2330h - Target replacement started. Old target removed (serial: TGT_TiN_0044, age: 87%, arc count: 412 lifetime).
0010h - New target installed (serial: TGT_TiN_0051, age: 0%). Break-in procedure started
Break-in: 30 min at 30% power, 30 min at 60% power, 10 min at 100% power.
0117h - W004 dep started with new target.
Subsequent wafers W005 through W025 processed without incident.
No arc events on new target.
W001 to W003: PASS (old target, pre-replacement)
W003: borderline thickness flagged for review (485 A)
Total target arc events this shift: 3 (all on old target)
LOT_0080 unloaded and staged for next step.

data.step: unloaded and staged for next step
